element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Real-time overhead controls with forward/backward movement, turning, strafing
Combat encounters increase in frequency and difficulty across 40+ floors
Environmental hazards integrated throughout maze progression
Logic puzzles required to progress through labyrinth
Traversal across 5 distinct areas: Ruins, Tower, Cave, Dark Zone, Fortress
Nemesis sorceress pursues player; repeated encounters with story significance

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Extended exploration-driven rhythm with punctuated combat encounters; addictive maze-crawling creates sustained engagement across ~20 hours

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to movement and basic combat in Ruins; foundational maze navigation
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multi-area traversal across Tower, Cave, Dark Zone; increased monster density and trap complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Fortress area with sustained danger; culmination of maze-crawling mastery required

notable_level_patterns.description: 40+ interconnected floors organized vertically; player must descend and navigate laterally within each stratum
Five distinct themed areas (Ruins, Tower, Cave, Dark Zone, Fortress) serve as macro-level progression checkpoints
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Transition from Ruins to Tower marks significant difficulty shift

notable_level_patterns.description: Dela Delon's constant presence creates atmospheric tension throughout; story encounters repeated across multiple floors
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Dela meetings punctuate all five areas

notable_level_patterns.description: Non-rotating automap creates navigation puzzle; spatial memory required despite mapping tool
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All 40+ floors utilize this cognitive load pattern
